instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Your visit this weekend
task.initialEmail: Hi,||I’m really happy that you’re coming to stay with me this weekend. [1]Are you still arriving on Friday evening?[/1]||[2]My brother wants to come with us when we go into town on Saturday. Is that OK?[/2]||[3]What would you like to do on Saturday afternoon?[/3] There’s a new café, a sports centre and a small museum near my house.||[4]Do you need me to meet you at the station?[/4]||Write soon||Mia

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Mia,||Thanks for your email. [1]Yes, I’m still arriving on Friday evening. My train gets to the station at about seven o’clock, so I should be at your house soon after that.[/1]||[2]I’m sorry, but I’d prefer your brother not to come with us because I haven’t seen you for ages and I’d like to spend some time just with you.[/2]||[3]On Saturday afternoon, I’d like to go to the new café. It sounds relaxing, and we can talk there.[/3]||[4]Could you meet me at the station, please? I don’t know the way to your house very well.[/4]||See you soon,||Lucy
